title: From - Witches' Song
content:
The owl is abroad,the bat and the toad,
And so is the cat-a mountain,
The ant and the mole sit both in a hole,
And frog peeps out o'the fountain;
The dogs they do bay,and the timbrels play,
The spindle is now a-turning;
The moon it is red,and the stars are fled,
And all the sky is a-burning.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ben Jonson delivers a powerful performance in "From - Witches' Song"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
